meta.description: Scrapes 4 Zambian job sites every 12h. Gemini 2.5 Flash (thinking disabled). Ingest auth via INGEST_API_KEY env only.
meta.exportNote: Import into n8n; set Google AI credential on Gemini nodes; set INGEST_API_KEY in n8n env.

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{message:"No jobs found in this scrape run",ts:new Date().toISOString()}}];
